use_codes.desc: SELECTIVE VASODILATION BY CONTINUOUS ADENOSINE INFUSION

indications.text:
This label may not be the latest approved by FDA.
For current labeling information, please visit https://www.fda.gov/drugsatfda
Intravenous Adenoscan is indicated as an adjunct to thallium-201 myocardial perfusion
scintigraphy in patients unable to exercise adequately (See WARNINGS).

Adenoscan (adenosine) is indicated as an adjunct to thallium-201 myocardial perfusion scintigraphy in patients unable to
exercise adequately.
